% ============================================================================
%  CROSS-RUN EVAL SUMMARY  --  TEMPLATE ENGINE
%  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
%  One benchmark, many runs, aggregated. Do NOT edit this file for a normal
%  summary -- put values in eval-summary-config.tex.
%
%  Build:   pdflatex eval-summary.tex   (run twice; or: make)
%
%  Inputs (all optional except the config):
%    eval-summary-config.tex   required  -- the parameter file
%    domain-pooled.csv         optional  -- per-domain pooled accuracy
%    runs.csv                  optional  -- arbitrary-length run manifest
% ============================================================================
\documentclass[10pt]{article}

\usepackage[a4paper,margin=20mm,headheight=14pt]{geometry}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\IfFileExists{lmodern.sty}{%
  \usepackage{lmodern}%
  \IfFileExists{microtype.sty}{\usepackage{microtype}}{}%
}{%
  % No scalable Latin Modern: skip microtype to avoid bitmap-font errors.
}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{csvsimple}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- palette ----
\definecolor{rcink}{HTML}{1A1A1A}
\definecolor{rcaccent}{HTML}{1E6B54}
\definecolor{rcrule}{HTML}{C9C2B6}
\definecolor{rcsoft}{HTML}{F4F1EA}
\definecolor{rcmute}{HTML}{6B6B6B}
\color{rcink}

% ============================================================================
%  PARAMETER STORE  (identical engine to the single run card)
% ============================================================================
\makeatletter
\newcommand{\rcset}[2]{\expandafter\def\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname{#2}}
\newcommand{\rc}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \expandafter\let\expandafter\rc@cur\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \ifx\rc@cur\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}%
    \else\rc@cur\fi
  \else\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}\fi}

\newcommand{\rchist}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \edef\rc@list{\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname}%
  \else\let\rc@list\@empty\fi
  \ifx\rc@list\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textit{(no histogram data)}}\else
  \begin{tikzpicture}[baseline=-2pt]
    \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcmax}{0}%
    \foreach \v in \rc@list{%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcmax}{max(\rcmax,\v)}\xdef\rcmax{\rcmax}}%
    \def\rcx{0}%
    \foreach \v in \rc@list{%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcbh}{(\rcmax>0)*(\v/\rcmax)*1.25 + 0.012}%
      \fill[rcaccent] (\rcx,0) rectangle ++(0.30,\rcbh);%
      \pgfmathsetmacro{\rcx}{\rcx+0.36}\xdef\rcx{\rcx}}%
    \draw[rcrule,line width=0.4pt] (-0.02,0) -- (\rcx,0);%
  \end{tikzpicture}\fi}

% --------------------------------------------------------- section styling ----
\titleformat{\section}{\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{rcink}}{}{0pt}%
  {\rule[-3pt]{0pt}{14pt}}[{\color{rcrule}\titlerule[1pt]}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{16pt}{8pt}
\setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.4em}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.28}

\newenvironment{rcfacts}{\par\smallskip}{\par}
\newcommand{\fact}[2]{%
  \noindent
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.25\linewidth}\raggedright\strut
    \bfseries\color{rcmute}#1\end{minipage}%
  \hfill
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.71\linewidth}\raggedright\strut #2\end{minipage}%
  \par\smallskip}

\newcommand{\stat}[2]{%
  \begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{}}%
  {\footnotesize\color{rcmute}#1}\\[1pt]{\large #2}%
  \end{tabular}}

% ---------------------------------------------------- header / footer ----
\pagestyle{fancy}\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\lhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}CROSS-RUN EVAL SUMMARY}
\rhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\texttt{\rc{summary.id}}}
\cfoot{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\thepage}

% --------------------------------------------- disclaimer defaults ----
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.dependence}}{\rcset{disc.dependence}{%
  \textbf{Runs are not independent.} The cohort shares one item bank and
  overlapping model families/weights; cross-run statistics are descriptive,
  not draws from a population of independent experiments.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.identical}}{\rcset{disc.identical}{%
  \textbf{Aggregation assumes an identical instrument.} Pooling is only valid
  while every run pins the same benchmark commit and item set; see the Cohort
  check --- any mismatch invalidates the pooled figures.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.heterogeneity}}{\rcset{disc.heterogeneity}{%
  \textbf{Between-run variance is confounded.} Run-to-run spread mixes genuine
  model differences with decoding nondeterminism and sampling noise; do not
  read dispersion as effect size without the reproducibility section.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.ranking}}{\rcset{disc.ranking}{%
  \textbf{Ranking is not a significance test.} Leaderboard order is by point
  estimate only; the count of CI-overlapping pairs is the relevant
  uncertainty statement.}}{}
\@ifundefined{rc@@\detokenize{disc.meta}}{\rcset{disc.meta}{%
  \textbf{Meta estimates are descriptive.} $\tau^2$/$I^2$ assume exchangeable
  independent runs; with a small, dependent cohort they are indicative only
  and $I^2$ is inflated by determinism.}}{}
\makeatother

% ============================================================================
\input{eval-summary-config.tex}

\begin{document}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- TITLE ----
\begin{center}
  {\Huge\bfseries Cross-Run Eval Summary}\\[4pt]
  {\color{rcmute}\small One Benchmark, Many Runs --- Aggregate \& Stability}
\end{center}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}
\vspace{6pt}
\noindent
\stat{SUMMARY ID}{\texttt{\rc{summary.id}}}\hfill
\stat{DATE ISSUED}{\rc{date.issued}}\hfill
\stat{N RUNS}{\rc{n.runs}}\hfill
\stat{POOLED ACC.}{\rc{acc.pooled}}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- HEADER ----
\section{Header}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Summary ID}{\texttt{\rc{summary.id}}}
\fact{Date issued}{\rc{date.issued}}
\fact{Benchmark (pinned)}{\rc{benchmark.name} \,\textbar\, \rc{benchmark.version}\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{source:} \rc{benchmark.source}}
\fact{N runs aggregated}{\rc{n.runs}}
\fact{Run selection}{\rc{run.selection}}
\fact{Aggregator}{\rc{aggregator.org} \,\textbar\, \rc{aggregator.tool}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------- COHORT & COMPARABILITY ----
\section{Cohort \& Comparability}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Pinned-benchmark check}{\textcolor{rcaccent}{\rc{cohort.pinned}}}
\fact{Models represented}{\rc{cohort.models}}
\fact{Replicate structure}{\rc{cohort.replicates}}
\fact{Item-set identity}{\textcolor{rcaccent}{\rc{cohort.itemset}}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------------- CROSS-RUN ACCURACY ----
\section{Cross-Run Accuracy}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Pooled accuracy}{\rc{acc.pooled}}
\fact{Run dispersion}{SD \rc{acc.sd}\quad min \rc{acc.min}\quad
  max \rc{acc.max}\quad range \rc{acc.range}\\[3pt]
  \rchist{acc.hist}}
\fact{Best / worst run}{$\uparrow$ \rc{acc.best}\\[2pt]
  $\downarrow$ \rc{acc.worst}}
\fact{Random-effects estimate}{pooled \rc{meta.pooled}\quad
  $\tau^2=\rc{meta.tau2}$\quad $I^2=\rc{meta.i2}$\\[2pt]
  \textcolor{rcaccent}{\small$\triangle$ \rc{meta.caveat}}}
\end{rcfacts}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- RANKING ----
\section{Ranking}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Indistinguishable pairs}{\rc{rank.indistinct}}
\fact{Top-rank set}{\rc{rank.topset}}
\fact{Leaderboard}{Full per-run ranking is the Run Manifest at the end
  (sorted as supplied in \texttt{runs.csv}).}
\end{rcfacts}

% -------------------------------------- REPRODUCIBILITY (REPLICATE RUNS) ----
\section{Reproducibility \textnormal{\small(replicate runs)}}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Replicate groups}{\rc{repro.groups}}
\fact{Test--retest SD}{\rc{repro.sd}}
\fact{Max within-config swing}{\rc{repro.maxswing}}
\fact{Verdict}{\textcolor{rcaccent}{\rc{repro.verdict}}}
\end{rcfacts}

% -------------------------- CROSS-RUN INSTRUMENT STABILITY (IRT) ----
\section{Cross-Run Instrument Stability (IRT)}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Item-difficulty agreement}{mean pairwise Spearman
  $\rho=\rc{irt.diff.rho}$\quad
  95\% CI [\rc{irt.diff.rho.lo},\,\rc{irt.diff.rho.hi}]
  \textcolor{rcmute}{\footnotesize\ (bootstrap)}}
\fact{Difficulty drift}{\rc{irt.drift.mean}\quad \rc{irt.drift.sd}}
\fact{Floor/ceiling flips}{\rc{irt.flips}}
\fact{Difficulty-shift outliers}{\rc{irt.dif}}
\end{rcfacts}

% --------------------- PERTURBATION CONSISTENCY ACROSS RUNS ----
\section{Perturbation Consistency Across Runs}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Sensitive-set agreement}{mean pairwise Jaccard \rc{pert.sens.jac}\quad
  95\% CI [\rc{pert.sens.jac.lo},\,\rc{pert.sens.jac.hi}]}
\fact{Stable-set agreement}{mean pairwise Jaccard \rc{pert.stab.jac}\quad
  95\% CI [\rc{pert.stab.jac.lo},\,\rc{pert.stab.jac.hi}]}
\fact{Dimension replication}{\rc{pert.dim.repl}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------ SEQUENTIAL STOPPING META ----
\section{Sequential Stopping \textnormal{\small(meta, retrospective)}}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Method}{\rc{stop.method}}
\fact{Median of medians}{\rc{stop.medmed}\quad
  IQR [\rc{stop.iqr.lo},\,\rc{stop.iqr.hi}]}
\fact{Fraction of runs stopped}{\rc{stop.frac.q4}\quad \rc{stop.frac.half}}
\fact{Caveat}{\textcolor{rcaccent}{Per-run stopping figures are
  retrospective counterfactuals; aggregating them does not create a
  prospective guarantee for the cohort.}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ----------------------------------------------------------- DISCLAIMERS ----
\section{Disclaimers}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em,itemsep=4pt]
  \item \rc{disc.dependence}
  \item \rc{disc.identical}
  \item \rc{disc.heterogeneity}
  \item \rc{disc.ranking}
  \item \rc{disc.meta}
\end{itemize}

% ------------------------------------------------------ RAW DATA REFERENCE ----
\section{Raw Data Reference}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Companion bundle}{\rc{companion.file}}
\fact{Hash}{\rc{companion.hash}}
\fact{Contents}{\rc{companion.contents}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ---- Optional per-domain pooled table -----------------------------------
\IfFileExists{domain-pooled.csv}{%
  \par\medskip\noindent\textbf{\color{rcmute}Per-domain pooled accuracy
  (mean across runs)}\par\smallskip
  \csvreader[
    tabular={@{}l r r r@{}},
    respect all,
    table head={\toprule\bfseries Domain & \bfseries Mean acc. &
      \bfseries SD & \bfseries Runs\\\midrule},
    table foot={\bottomrule},
    late after line=\\,
  ]{domain-pooled.csv}{}{\csvcoli & \csvcolii & \csvcoliii & \csvcoliv}%
}{}

% ---- Run manifest: arbitrary number of runs, paginated ------------------
% One row per constituent run; reads runs.csv if present. Columns positional,
% header row auto-skipped, longtable paginates with repeating header/footer.
% Expected: run_id, model, revision, date, accuracy, ci_low, ci_high, n_items
% (CI is split into two comma-free columns and composed here.)
\IfFileExists{runs.csv}{%
  \par\medskip\noindent\textbf{\color{rcmute}Run manifest (every constituent
  run, paginated)}\par\smallskip
  {\scriptsize
  \csvreader[
    respect all,
    longtable=@{}>{\ttfamily\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.22\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.15\linewidth}
                  >{\ttfamily\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.10\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.10\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedleft\arraybackslash}p{0.07\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{0.16\linewidth}
                  >{\raggedleft\arraybackslash}p{0.05\linewidth}@{},
    table head={\toprule\bfseries run\_id & \bfseries model &
      \bfseries revision & \bfseries date & \bfseries acc. &
      \bfseries 95\% CI & \bfseries N\\\midrule\endhead
      \midrule\multicolumn{7}{r}{\itshape continued on next page}\\
      \endfoot\bottomrule\endlastfoot},
  ]{runs.csv}{}{%
    \csvcoli & \csvcolii & \csvcoliii & \csvcoliv &
    \csvcolv & [\csvcolvi,\,\csvcolvii] & \csvcolviii}%
  }%
}{%
  \par\smallskip\textcolor{rcmute}{\itshape No \texttt{runs.csv} supplied
  --- per-run manifest omitted; the companion bundle above is authoritative.}
  \par}

\end{document}
